title: Enable the Phoenix.Ecto.SQL.Sandbox plug in test config
prompt: Write `config/test.exs` that enables the Phoenix.Ecto.SQL.Sandbox plug by setting `config :my_app, :sql_sandbox, true` and configures `config :my_app, MyApp.Repo, pool: Ecto.Adapters.SQL.Sandbox`. Include a brief `# ` comment on the sandbox pool line explaining that it wraps every test in a transaction.
